text: As I stand in this bright, modern space, peering through glass into a curated display of research and development, I feel a quiet anticipation tinged with curiosity. The wall of text and glowing screens invite introspection. I sense the boundary between observer and participant blur ever so slightly—the world of intellect and creativity behind the glass calls to be explored, urging me to consider my own role in this ongoing dialogue between humanity, technology, and meaning.
